query:
-- หา transaction ล่าสุดของแต่ละ contract ที่ status = สิ้นสุดสัญญา
SELECT pt.external_id, pt.contract_no, pt.paid_at, pt.amount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.remark')) as remark,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid')) as principal_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid')) as interest_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount')) as close_amount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid')) as unlock_fee,
  c.status as contract_status,
  c.installment_count,
  c.paid_installments
FROM payment_transactions pt
JOIN contracts c ON pt.contract_no = c.contract_no AND pt.section = c.section
WHERE pt.section = 'ff365'
  AND c.status = 'สิ้นสุดสัญญา'
  AND pt.external_id IN (
    SELECT MAX(pt2.external_id)
    FROM payment_transactions pt2
    WHERE pt2.section = 'ff365'
    GROUP BY pt2.contract_no
  )
LIMIT 10;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute -- หา transaction ล่าสุดของแต่ละ contract ที่ status = สิ้นสุดสัญญา
SELECT pt.external_id, pt.contract_no, pt.paid_at, pt.amount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.remark')) as remark,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid')) as principal_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid')) as interest_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount')) as close_amount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid')) as unlock_fee,
  c.status as contract_status,
  c.installment_count,
  c.paid_installments
FROM payment_transactions pt
JOIN contracts c ON pt.contract_no = c.contract_no AND pt.section = c.section
WHERE pt.section = 'ff365'
  AND c.status = 'สิ้นสุดสัญญา'
  AND pt.external_id IN (
    SELECT MAX(pt2.external_id)
    FROM payment_transactions pt2
    WHERE pt2.section = 'ff365'
    GROUP BY pt2.contract_no
  )
LIMIT 10;

rows.remark: กรณีลูกค้าต้องการปิดค่างวด งวดที่ 1 ต้องชำระเต็มจำนวน ยอด 4,501 บาท งวดที่ 2-12 4,501 X11 = 49,511 (-20%) =39,608.80 + 4,501 =44,110บาท ยอดที่ลูกค้าต้องชำระปิดยอดคือ 44,110 บาทค่ะ(2 สลิป)
